title: Collection and preservation of eDNA from marine water samples
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"1b4ek","text":"This protocol is designed for water collection from Niskin bottles and filtration at sea using reusable filter cups.","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dpcvj","text":"","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a8ibf","text":"Aim: to collect and filter 2.5 L of water at each depth from each CTD cast and preserved the filter at room temperature in lysis buffer","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":135}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4018p","text":"","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"fbipc","text":"Water should be filtered immediately after collection.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"al271","text":"Only DNA-free forceps should touch the filter!","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1tpis","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

A100H047A)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":71,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8qhu3","text":"pump","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"as2qa","text":"3-port manifold","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dcrs7","text":"tubing adaptors","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bvq4l","text":"wastewater container carboy","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f4t7d","text":"labeled tubes containing 2 ml of Longmires’s buffer","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1eehu","text":"bleach (5%) and bleach bucket","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3gg85","text":"distilled water","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"855p7","text":"2 buckets (for bleach and rinsing)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"euvmu","text":"mesh bags","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9raph","text":"drying racks","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4khbe","text":"bungees","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dmdg2","text":"absorbent towelsµ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3f9qj","text":"distilled water from the evaporator onboard and from the lab","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Place all used small items in a small mesh bag and the filter cups in a large mesh bag in bleach for at least 00:30:00
Rinse the abovementioned items for at least 00:10:00
Allow to dry on the drying racks
Wearing a fresh pair of gloves, mount filter cups with new sterile filter
Let the water from the hull (“surface water sample”) run for > 00:03:00 while the CTD is being deployed
Collect 2 samples of 2.5 L each of “surface water” for each CTD cast in 69oz whirlpack bags. Use pitchers for support and stability.

Once the CTD rosette has been brought back to the surface, water needs to be extracted from each Niskin bottle and transported into the lab for filtration. We want to collect 2.5 L of water from each Niskin. Wipe the spigot on the Niskin with DNAway to remove potential contaminants on the outside of the Niskin
Flush water (count to 10) from the Niskin to further reduce risk of contamination and collect 2.5 L L of water in a whirlpack bag and place in 2L pitcher
Include a sampling negative control by collecting 2.5 L of distilled H2O (at least daily)
Wipe working area with DNAway. Use a clean absorbant pad each day for the filtration station.
Switch on the pump and set vacuum in the middle range between-8 and -12 bars (keep an eye on the gauge & adjust if necessary)
Pour water from whirlpack bag (supported by pitcher) into the filter cup, repeat until finished (2.5L of water)
Using DNA-free forceps fold filter and place in pre-labeled tube pre-filled with preservative buffer ( 2 mL , Longmire Buffer in a 5 ml LoBind tube). Longmire lysis buffer by Ana Ramón-Laca
Filter 2.5 L of ship distilled H2O every time the cleaning distilled H2O is replaced as a sampling negative control
Every 2-3 days 2 L of lab diH2O should be filtered as sampling negative controls
Note tube label in notes. Also note time filtered, membrane type, place filtered (field/lab, which lab), etc.
Store samples at room temperature away from UV light

Set up wash station (two buckets, one with 0.5% bleach, one with clean distilled H 2 O) Replace bleach and water stations at regular intervals (at least every other day, 0.5% bleach = 1.2 L bleach in 20L bucket)
creator: Ana Ramón-Laca
